case_title: LIBERTY MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY VS. CHRISHARA GENENE HOLMES et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT HOLMES, CHRISHARA GENENE DILLARD, IRENE

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIBERTY MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED JAN-17-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DILLARD, IRENE
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-11-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR - DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-08-2013 CONTINUED TO SEP-11-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
